title: A facile and one pot highly efficient synthesis of 1,3-oxathiolan-5-one derivatives
author: Deepak Kumar Kashyap
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, NIMS University, Sobha Nagar, Jaipur-303 121, Rajasthan, India 

  E-mail  : deepakkashyap601@gmail.com, ashima560@gmail.com 

 Department of Chemistry, Meerut College, Meerut-250 001, Uttar Pradesh, India 

  Manuscript received online 05 October 2014, accepted 21 October 2014  

 An efficient and effective method for the synthesis of 1,3-oxathiolan-5-one derivatives by cyclocondensation reaction at room temperature has been described. This method is an excellent way to obtain the title compounds in quantitative yields in a simple and cost effective way. Applying this methodology, different heterocycles possessing 1,3- oxathiolan-5-one moiety were synthesized.
